## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's approach to optimizing content for LLM mentions and plan research/experiments to improve their strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to understand and optimize content for LLM mentions, moving beyond traditional SEO tactics](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Three-phase approach planned: 1) Research LLM search mechanics, 2) Analyze data/run ML models for insights, 3) Conduct specific tactic experiments](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current focus on product evaluation prompts, with challenges in prompt selection and measurement of effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current LLM Landscape and Challenges

  - [Shift from Google-driven organic awareness to LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Difficulty in accurately measuring LLM mentions and understanding the underlying mechanics](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Existing tools (e.g., Scrunch, Profound) have limitations in accurately representing LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Focus on product evaluation prompts (e.g., "What is an open-source alternative to GitHub?")](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Experimenting with tactics like adding FAQs, TLDRs, and table of contents to pages](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Exploring the effectiveness of lm.txt files for educating LLMs about websites/products](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

### Research and Experimentation Approach

  - [Phase 1: Understand LLM search mechanics through exploratory research](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Phase 2: Create and analyze datasets to uncover insights using ML models](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Phase 3: Conduct experiments on specific tactics (e.g., lm.txt, Reddit posts, page content structure)](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Challenges in LLM Optimization

  - [Uncertainty about LLM indexing and citation processes (e.g., Google's role in LLM searches)](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Difficulty in selecting representative prompts for testing and measurement](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Balancing traditional SEO factors with new LLM-specific optimization techniques](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Marketing and Positioning

  - [Importance of effectively communicating research findings and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
  - [Goal to position GrowthX as experts in LLM search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/oFLGQGVm1LJncxsAU_BhiNw_orFYQ6Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
